form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== employeeId[被评估员工] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] =========>detail[评估明细]====== assessmentType[评估类型] assessorId[评估人] assessmentDate[评估日期] =========>result[评估结果]====== overallScore[综合评分] status[状态] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== employeeId[被评估员工] orgId[业务组织] businessDate[业务日期] =========>detail[评估明细]====== assessmentType[评估类型] assessorId[评估人] assessmentDate[评估日期] =========>result[评估结果]====== overallScore[综合评分] status[状态] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: employeeId[被评估员工] assessmentType[评估类型] status[状态] assessorId[评估人] businessDate[业务日期]
